purpose: First GCTX-1 proof-model training run after the strict reviewed SFT data gate.

model.tokenizer: code-and-diff-aware tokenizer, to be finalized before training
model.objective: supervised fine-tuning on reviewed Conventional Commit examples

training.precision: bf16 or fp16 depending on target runtime
training.checkpoint_policy: save resumable checkpoints and final model artifacts
training.reproducibility: record seed, git revision, training code revision, dataset checksum, and runtime

evaluation.quality_claim_policy: No public model-quality claim until a model card and eval card are written from locked REPORT results.
